name: choice-poll-demo
visual_summary: A choice poll component for displaying a list of options and allowing users to vote for their preferred choice. It is commonly used in applications where user feedback is required, such as surveys or decision-making processes. Developers would use this component to gather opinions and make data-driven decisions.
